scripts.ship:strategy: sh -c 'npm run dev:check && if [ -n "$1" ]; then npm run ship -- "$1"; else npm run ship; fi' --
scripts.ac: git add . && sh -c 'git commit -m "${1:-chore: 提交變更}"' --
scripts.ship: sh -c 'npm run dev:check && if [ -n "$1" ]; then npm run ac -- "$1"; else npm run ac; fi && git push && npm run deploy' --
